title: Pirate Adventures
description: Pirates is a huge project for the Minecraft game in the form of a DataPack. By installing the required ResourcePack and the DataPack itself, you get a large number of new mobs, items, blocks, mechanics, and bosses.
body:
Pirates is a huge project for the Minecraft game in the form of a DataPack. By installing the required ResourcePack and the DataPack itself, you get a large number of new mobs, items, blocks, mechanics, and bosses. In total, the project was developed over 1.5 years by several developers at once. The main author of the DataPack is the player BigSTy.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/7SKg7kA-o4E" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**Playing it you will be able to meet dozens of new mobs and blocks, hundreds of new items, a large number of structures and several interesting mechanics.**


It **DOES NOT** require optifine or any other add-ons. Just install the resource pack and data pack, then enjoy the game. This is only the first version of the project, so I ask you to share your impressions, as well as warn about bugs.


**THE ENTIRE DATAPACK HAS BEEN TRANSLATED INTO 3 LANGUAGES: English, Ukrainian, Russian. Translation works depending on the selected language in the game.**


Since the project is too large for one page of text, a [WIKIpedia website](https://bigsty.github.io/PirateWIKI/) was specially developed. On it you can read all the information about all the elements of the datapack.


**I would be very grateful if you watch the author's video review for at least a few minutes. Yes, it is only in Russian, but it is not always necessary to understand the language XD.**
